principle: Clearforge social assets should clearly signal a subject and payoff, but quality imperfections do not block otherwise safe publication.

checks.opening: If your AI can act across apps and services, the real question is whether you can see what it did.
How do you keep AI agents from becoming a black box?
If your team uses AI in a customer workflow, who gets the alert when something breaks?
If an AI system can act across apps and services, observability is no longer optional.

pinterest.title: AI Workflow Cost Checklist: Watch the Hidden Infrastructure Spend
